overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. A character in futuristic armor explores a dimly lit industrial corridor with red emergency lighting, metal walkways, and heavy machinery. The atmosphere is tense with atmospheric haze and derelict environmental details suggesting a derelict spacecraft or station.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage bay with metal crate and fencing

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the industrial corridor, examining the surroundings

entered.detail: large white metal container with warning labels sitting on the floor
metal mesh fencing blocking off a red-lit hazardous area in the background
thick industrial piping and conduits running along the ceiling
red and white emergency lights casting ominous glow on surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dimly lit industrial storage area with a large metal crate in the center and chain-link fencing blocking off hazardous areas. Red emergency lighting creates a tense atmosphere as the character walks forward through the concrete-floored room.

events.description: character turns right to face down the corridor toward the airlock

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor past heavy machinery toward a distant doorway

entered.detail: massive circular metal door with locking mechanisms and green indicator lights
simple metal folding chair against the wall
wall-mounted industrial control interface with buttons and screens

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrower corridor where a massive circular airlock door dominates the right side. The metal chair and control panels suggest this is a functional airlock or maintenance access point. The character continues walking toward a distant doorway as the storage crate and fence from the previous area fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial storage area that transitions into a narrow maintenance corridor. It begins in a concrete-floored room dominated by a large metal crate and chain-link fencing, all bathed in the tense glow of red emergency lighting. As the character walks forward, the camera turns right, leaving the storage crate and fencing behind to enter a more confined space. The scene then shifts to a narrower hallway where a massive circular airlock door, accompanied by a metal chair and control panels, dominates the right side. The movement finally carries the character deeper into the corridor, heading toward a distant doorway.
